name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Flows X-Force Categorization)
notes:
This Building Block defines communication with a potential hostile IP address, categorized by F-Force.

Note: X-Force categorization is available for free of use. The Confidence Factor ranges between 0 to 100. On assets of lower importance, an administrator might weigh an X-Force rule to trigger on a higher confidence factor of 75. When tuning rules, customers should think of a scale where 50 is the tipping point.

See the blog https://ibm.biz/BdPEXv for details.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Flows X-Force Categorization) on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Local

when the flow matches XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Anonymization Services',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Anonymization Services',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Malware',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Malware',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Botnet Command and Control Server',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Botnet Command and Control Server',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Spam',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Spam',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Cryptocurrency Mining',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Cryptocurrency Mining',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Scanning IPs',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Scanning IPs',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Bots',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Bots',destinationip) > 75 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Flows X-Force Categorization) on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the flow context is Local to Local

AND when the flow matches XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Anonymization Services',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Anonymization Services',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Malware',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Malware',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Botnet Command and Control Server',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Botnet Command and Control Server',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Spam',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Spam',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Cryptocurrency Mining',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Cryptocurrency Mining',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Scanning IPs',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Scanning IPs',destinationip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Bots',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Bots',destinationip) > 75 AQL filter query
